mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications ( receiver_id, board_id, comment_id, message ) VALUES ( #{receiverId}, #{boardId}, #{commentId}, #{message} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, receiver_id, board_id, comment_id, message, is_read, created_at FROM notifications WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = FALSE
